scripts.dev: npm run build && npx wrangler dev --port 8788
scripts.deploy: npm run build && npx wrangler deploy
scripts.migrate:create: npx wrangler d1 migrations create DB
scripts.migrate:apply:local: npx wrangler d1 migrations apply DB --local
scripts.migrate:apply:remote: npx wrangler d1 migrations apply DB --remote
scripts.migrate:list:local: npx wrangler d1 migrations list DB --local
scripts.migrate:list:remote: npx wrangler d1 migrations list DB --remote
scripts.test:integration: npm run build && vitest run --config vitest.config.ts
scripts.test: npm run test:unit && npm run test:integration
